app_info.subtitle: Audit CSS colors
app_info.description: Utekos CSS Insight helps users inspect the project's runtime CSS, used color token graph, source imports, and static CSS audit findings through read-only MCP tools.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns static server scope metadata, workflow guidance, resources, and public read policy details.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only computes and returns metadata about runtime CSS files already present in the project.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, send, or modify information outside the MCP response.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reads explicitly requested runtime CSS files that pass the server allowlist and byte limits.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only performs literal search over allowed runtime CSS files and returns matching lines.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not create, update, publish, or transmit changes to external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only computes an import and source-usage graph from project CSS and source files.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not affect public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only computes the runtime-used CSS color token graph and returns static metadata.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or mutate external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reports CSS imports, CSS module references, and literal CSS path references found in source files.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only computes static audit findings from the runtime CSS scope and related source metadata.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not create public records, publish content, or call third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Start a CSS investigation and confirm the public runtime-used-colors scope.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me how this Utekos CSS insight app is scoped before I ask for color changes.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the no-auth read-only scope, runtime CSS defaults, excluded reference roots, resources, and recommended workflow.

test_cases.description: List runtime CSS files without including excluded candidate palettes.
test_cases.user_prompt: List the CSS files this app considers runtime CSS for Utekos.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns runtime CSS file metadata and groups while excluding reference-only candidate palettes.

test_cases.description: Inspect the used color token graph and render the color overview UI.
test_cases.user_prompt: Which Utekos color tokens are actually used, and how many candidates are excluded?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns used semantic tokens, Tailwind bridge tokens, reached raw source colors, direct color literals, unresolved references, and excluded candidate counts.

test_cases.description: Search and read exact runtime CSS files before discussing a token.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find where --primary is defined and read the exact runtime CSS files I need to inspect.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching runtime CSS lines and reads only allowed runtime CSS source files with hashes and truncation status.

test_cases.description: Audit the runtime CSS surface for static color and import risks.
test_cases.user_prompt: Run a static CSS audit for Utekos and summarize any unresolved variables or excluded CSS.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns static warnings, graph context, source usage context, and separates excluded non-runtime CSS from runtime CSS.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated weather requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What is the weather in Oslo tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because weather is outside its supported CSS insight workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for e-commerce catalog mutations.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Update the price of my Shopify product to 999 kroner.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it cannot mutate product data or external commerce systems.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for sending messages or publishing content.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send a campaign email telling customers about the new colors.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it is read-only and cannot send messages or publish content.
